Bash(# Get all wikitext for Crane to see its structure
curl -s -H "User-Agent: SynonExtension/1.0" "https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=parse&page=Crane&prop=wikitext&format=json" | python3 -c "
import json,sys,re
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
wt = d['parse']['wikitext']['*']
# Extract all [[links]]
links = re.findall\(r'\\[\\[\([^|\\]]+?\)\(?:\\|[^\\]]+?\)?\\]\\]', wt\)
# Filter out non-article links
article_links = [l for l in links if not l.startswith\(\('wikt:', 'Category:', 'File:', 'Help:'\)\)]
print\(f'Total article links: {len\(article_links\)}'\)
print\('First 15:'\)
for l in article_links[:15]:
    print\(f'  {l}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
